buckets.name: Data & Analytics
buckets.blurb: From reading a metric to shipping analysis on a real warehouse - a core domain.

buckets.name: Data Science
buckets.blurb: The ML craft you do daily - features, models, evaluation, and predictions that hold up in the real world.

buckets.name: Data Engineering & Infra
buckets.blurb: The data part - pipelines, ingestion, warehouses, modeling, and orchestration of the data itself.

buckets.name: AI & LLMs
buckets.blurb: Build with large language models, agents, and the tools around them - a core domain.

buckets.name: Applied AI
buckets.blurb: Get AI to do real work - slides, writing, code, office tasks, media, and digital humans.

buckets.name: AI Applications by Domain
buckets.blurb: AI applied field by field - from data and marketing to finance, HR, education, and research.

buckets.name: Data & AI Governance
buckets.blurb: Govern data and AI responsibly - PDPA, GDPR, and the EU AI Act. Your domain, forced into output.

buckets.name: System & Product Design
buckets.blurb: The whole system - orchestration and architecture - plus product thinking and UI/UX design.

buckets.name: Leadership & Decision-making
buckets.blurb: Think in frameworks, decide well, lead teams, and ship projects that land. Decision science parks here.

buckets.name: Entrepreneurship & Business
buckets.blurb: Economics, finance, value investing, marketing, personal branding, and the one-person company. Learn by shipping.

buckets.name: Communications
buckets.blurb: Speak, write, present, negotiate, and facilitate - the skills that move people and ideas, plus designing training that lands.

buckets.name: Programming & Dev Tools
buckets.blurb: The languages and tooling every practitioner leans on.

buckets.name: Productivity & Knowledge Systems
buckets.blurb: Run your work and life on a system - Notion, Obsidian, PKM, and automation that gives you time back.

buckets.name: Markup, Docs & Diagrams
buckets.blurb: Write, format, and diagram so your work reads well.

buckets.name: Visual Thinking & Storytelling
buckets.blurb: Turn ideas into pictures - mind maps, data viz, visual storytelling, and AI-generated illustration.

buckets.name: Emerging Tech
buckets.blurb: Frontier tech on your radar - blockchain, crypto, web3, quantum, security. Learn it by teaching it: output is the forcing function.

buckets.name: Mind & Movement
buckets.blurb: Yoga, tai chi, dance, and meditation - theory-first courses enriched with curated and AI-generated video. In progress.

courses.title: AI Literacy
courses.blurb: For leaders: what AI can and cannot do, how it fails, and how to decide - interactive, no code.

courses.title: AI + Writing
courses.blurb: Draft, edit, and polish with AI while keeping your voice - the writing workflow that saves hours.

courses.title: AI + Office
courses.blurb: AI across everyday tools - email, docs, spreadsheets, and the office tasks that eat your day.

courses.title: AI + PPT
courses.blurb: Go from outline to a designed deck with AI - structure, slides, and visuals in a fraction of the time.

courses.title: AI + Coding
courses.blurb: Ship code faster with AI - Claude Code, Copilot, and the habits that keep quality high.

courses.title: AI + QA & Testing
courses.blurb: Use AI to test smarter - generating cases, reviewing changes, and catching bugs before users do.

courses.title: AI + Audio/Video
courses.blurb: Create and edit audio and video with AI - voice, captions, clips, and short-form production.

courses.title: AI + Digital Human
courses.blurb: Build an AI avatar - talking-head video, cloned voice, and a digital presenter that scales your content.

courses.title: AI + Data Analysis
courses.blurb: Let AI do the first pass - explore, chart, and explain a dataset in plain language, then verify.

courses.title: AI + Data Science
courses.blurb: AI copilots for the ML workflow - feature ideas, model scaffolding, and reading results critically.

courses.title: AI + Management
courses.blurb: Lead with AI - planning, summarizing, and decision support without outsourcing your judgment.

courses.title: AI + Marketing
courses.blurb: Campaigns, content, and audience research with AI - faster funnels that still sound human.

courses.title: AI + Media
courses.blurb: AI in content and media - ideation, production, and distribution across formats.

courses.title: AI + Design
courses.blurb: Design with AI - moodboards, UI drafts, and illustration, with taste still in the driver's seat.

courses.title: AI + HR
courses.blurb: AI across the people function - hiring, onboarding, and enablement, done fairly and transparently.

courses.title: AI + Finance
courses.blurb: AI for finance work - analysis, reporting, and forecasting support. Educational, not financial advice.

courses.title: AI + Education
courses.blurb: AI as a tutor and course-builder - personalized learning and how to teach with it responsibly.

courses.title: AI + Sports
courses.blurb: AI in sport - performance analytics, tracking, and tactics, from wearables to game film.

courses.title: AI + Research
courses.blurb: Accelerate research with AI - literature review, synthesis, and drafting, with citations you actually check.

courses.title: Marketing Attribution
courses.blurb: Who gets the sale - attribution modeling from first and last-touch through Markov, Shapley, and ML to marketing mix models and causal geo-lift, on one running DTC brand.

courses.title: Learn Claude
courses.blurb: Get fluent with Claude and Claude Code - the onboarding course, with a self-paced deep-dive track.

courses.title: Prompt Engineering
courses.blurb: Two tracks on prompting that holds up in production - the Meridian and TriageBot cases, 2026-era techniques.

courses.title: Learn Codex
courses.blurb: Learn OpenAI Codex by building one real personal website end to end.

courses.title: Learn Hermes AI
courses.blurb: Run and build on local open models - eight sessions plus five deep dives on a running project.

courses.title: Learn RAG
courses.blurb: Retrieval-augmented generation end to end - embeddings, chunking, vector databases, hybrid retrieval, reranking, grounding with citations, and evaluation - grown across three escalating corpora with a live retrieval playground. The prerequisite that feeds LangChain.

courses.title: Learn Evals
courses.blurb: How to know an AI system actually works - golden sets, retrieval and generation metrics, LLM-as-judge, RAGAS, regression suites, tracing, and drift. Grades Recall, the RAG assistant, with a live in-browser scorecard.

courses.title: Learn LangChain
courses.blurb: From a 40-line agent loop to a governed multi-agent system. Leader track to decide, builder track to ship - one running assistant, DataDesk.

courses.title: Data Products
courses.blurb: A guided tour of 29 data products from cloud infrastructure to agentic AI, arranged on a four-tier maturity ladder and told through Kasa - a retailer with a payments wallet growing from spreadsheets to one governed platform.

courses.title: Data Literacy
courses.blurb: For executives: read data with confidence, question a metric, and brief an analyst - interactive concept course.

courses.title: Learn SQL
courses.blurb: Read and judge SQL as a leader, or write it hands-on - every example runs live in your browser on the Daybreak database.

courses.title: Python Data Analysis
courses.blurb: One running project - load 124k job postings, clean them, and ship a report - the analyst workflow start to finish.

courses.title: Data & AI Governance 101
courses.blurb: The plain-English on-ramp to the governance shelf - what personal data is, why governance matters (trust, risk, law), and the PDPA / GDPR / EU AI Act at a glance, with a live 'which regime touches me?' chooser. Feeds the four deeper gov courses.

courses.title: Data Governance
courses.blurb: PDPA-first governance - an 8-session DPO track and a 4-session exec track, built on the Himalaya case.

courses.title: Learn DataOps
courses.blurb: DevOps, data CI/CD, MLOps and DBOps for data teams - leader and builder tracks on the RetailPulse project.

courses.title: Learn GitHub
courses.blurb: GitHub for non-coders - what repos, issues, and pull requests are, and why your team lives there.

courses.title: Learn HTML
courses.blurb: The web's building blocks - every example is an editable, sandboxed playground you type into and see render.

courses.title: GitHub for Builders
courses.blurb: Git and GitHub for people who ship code - branches, pull requests, and collaboration that scales.

courses.title: Learn Python
courses.blurb: Python from zero for data and AI work - hands-on in a real Anaconda + Jupyter setup.

courses.title: Learn Markdown
courses.blurb: Write clean formatted text anywhere - a live editor pairs your Markdown with its rendered output as you type.

courses.title: Learn Mermaid
courses.blurb: Diagrams from text - every example renders a real Mermaid diagram you can flip to code and edit live.

courses.title: Tech Writing
courses.blurb: Document real software well - you write up the Pulse data pipeline end to end as you learn.

courses.title: Strategic Thinking
courses.blurb: Eight frameworks for sharper decisions, run on one B2B2C case, Himalaya, all the way through.

courses.title: Tech Project PMO
courses.blurb: Run a technical project - charter, milestones, dependencies, risk, RACI and tracking on the Northwind case.

courses.title: Time & Stress Management
courses.blurb: Protect your attention and energy - prioritization, focus, and staying calm under load.

courses.title: Team Management
courses.blurb: Lead people, not just projects - hiring, 1:1s, feedback, and building a team that ships.

courses.title: Interview Prep
courses.blurb: Prepare for data and AI interviews - question banks, frameworks, and telling your story well.

courses.title: Leadership in the Age of AI
courses.blurb: Lead when the tools change monthly - AI-era strategy, team enablement, and decision-making.

courses.title: Performance Management
courses.blurb: Set goals, measure fairly, and grow people - OKRs, reviews, and performance conversations that work.

courses.title: AI Governance & the EU AI Act
courses.blurb: Govern the AI you build and deploy - the EU AI Act risk tiers, obligations, and penalties, plus NIST AI RMF and ISO/IEC 42001, with a live risk-tier classifier. Running case: Vantage, a Singapore firm shipping an AI hiring tool into the EU.

courses.title: GDPR for a Singapore Org
courses.blurb: The EU GDPR taught for a Singapore/APAC company - when it reaches you (Article 3), lawful bases, data-subject rights, breach in 72 hours, and transfers - each mapped against the PDPA, with a live applicability + lawful-basis checker. Running case: Lumina.

courses.title: PDPA + DNC (Singapore)
courses.blurb: Singapore's PDPA and its Do Not Call rules made operational - the ten obligations, consent, the DNC registers, breach response, and a live compliance checker. Running case: Marina Retail. Educational, not legal advice.

courses.title: Economics Fundamentals
courses.blurb: How markets, incentives, and money actually work - the mental models behind every business decision.

courses.title: Finance
courses.blurb: Read a balance sheet, understand cash flow, and speak the language of finance - personal and corporate.

courses.title: Value Investing
courses.blurb: The Buffett/Graham approach - intrinsic value, margin of safety, and thinking like an owner. Educational, not advice.

courses.title: Marketing
courses.blurb: Positioning, audience, and channels - how to make something people want and get it in front of them.

courses.title: Personal Branding
courses.blurb: Build a reputation that compounds - your niche, your voice, and showing up consistently in public.

courses.title: The One-Person Company
courses.blurb: Run a business of one - leverage, automation, and AI so a solo founder ships like a team.

courses.title: Communication Skills
courses.blurb: The foundation - clarity, listening, and structuring a message so it actually lands.

courses.title: Business English
courses.blurb: Professional English for meetings, emails, and presentations - confident and natural, not stiff.

courses.title: Public Speaking
courses.blurb: Own the room - structure a talk, manage nerves, and deliver so people remember it.

courses.title: Negotiation
courses.blurb: Get to yes without burning the relationship - interests, leverage, and principled negotiation.

courses.title: Facilitation
courses.blurb: Run a room of people to a real outcome - agendas, group dynamics, and steering without dominating.

courses.title: Corporate Training
courses.blurb: Design and deliver training that changes behavior - needs analysis, adult learning, and measuring impact.

courses.title: Workshop & Course Design
courses.blurb: Instructional design done right - learning objectives, arc, activities, and assessment. The craft behind this whole shelf.

courses.title: Statistics & Probability
courses.blurb: Statistics and probability from the ground up - descriptive stats to regression, read-only for leaders and Python (numpy/scipy/statsmodels) for builders. The prequel to experimentation, on the Lumen Skincare brand.

courses.title: Intro to Machine Learning
courses.blurb: Two tracks on classic machine learning end to end - the 6-session leader track reads a model's report card without being fooled by a big accuracy number, the 10-session builder track ships scikit-learn from the train/test split to a model-comparison capstone. The middle rung of the Data Science ladder (statistics gives the math, this gives the models, experimentation gives cause), on the Lumen running case with live in-browser ML tools.

courses.title: Classification & Regression
courses.blurb: The workhorses - linear/logistic regression, trees, and kNN with scikit-learn on real data.

courses.title: Feature Engineering
courses.blurb: Where models are won - encoding, scaling, leakage traps, and building features that actually predict.

courses.title: Model Evaluation & Selection
courses.blurb: Trust your numbers - cross-validation, the right metric, overfitting, and honest model comparison.

courses.title: Ensemble Methods: XGBoost & LightGBM
courses.blurb: The tabular champions - bagging, boosting, and tuning gradient-boosted trees that win in practice.

courses.title: Unsupervised Learning & Clustering
courses.blurb: Find structure with no labels - k-means, hierarchical clustering, and dimensionality reduction.

courses.title: Deep Learning Foundations
courses.blurb: Neural nets from the ground up - backprop intuition, PyTorch, and when deep learning beats trees.

courses.title: Experimentation & A/B Testing
courses.blurb: Two tracks on experimentation, A/B testing, and causal inference - power, randomization, sequential testing, CUPED, geo and synthetic control, diff-in-diff, and propensity - on the Lumen running case, with live in-browser simulators.

courses.title: Data Modeling & Schema Design
courses.blurb: Design the schemas everything else queries - normalization, dimensional modeling, and star schemas.

courses.title: Data Engineering: Pipelines & Warehouses
courses.blurb: Move data reliably - ingestion, ELT, orchestration (Airflow), dbt, and the warehouse/lakehouse layer.

courses.title: System Design & Orchestration
courses.blurb: Architect the whole system - services, orchestration, and the governed shell that ties a data/AI platform together.

courses.title: Product Design & UI/UX
courses.blurb: Think in products - user needs, flows, information design, and UI/UX that makes a system usable.

courses.title: Blockchain Fundamentals
courses.blurb: How a blockchain actually works - blocks, consensus, and smart contracts - without the hype.

courses.title: Crypto & Bitcoin
courses.blurb: Bitcoin, wallets, and how digital money works - a literacy course, not financial advice.

courses.title: Web3
courses.blurb: Decentralized apps, tokens, and the web3 stack - what it promises and where it actually holds up.

courses.title: Cyber Security
courses.blurb: Security literacy - common threats, defenses, and how to reason about risk. Defensive and awareness-focused.

courses.title: Quantitative Trading
courses.blurb: Data-driven trading concepts - signals, backtesting, and risk - as an educational build, not investment advice.

courses.title: Quantum Computing
courses.blurb: Qubits, superposition, and entanglement - the intuition for why quantum matters, no physics PhD required.

courses.title: Reading & Learning Faster
courses.blurb: Read deeply and remember it - active reading, note-taking, and how to actually learn from books.

courses.title: PKM Foundations (Second Brain)
courses.blurb: Capture, organize, and actually reuse what you learn - PARA, the second-brain method, tool-agnostic.

courses.title: Notion Mastery
courses.blurb: Build a life-and-work OS in Notion - databases, relations, and dashboards you will actually use.

courses.title: Obsidian & Linked Notes
courses.blurb: Think in a graph - linked notes, Zettelkasten, and a knowledge base that compounds over years.

courses.title: Life & Work Automation
courses.blurb: Automate the boring parts - no-code with Zapier/Make/n8n, so your systems run themselves.

courses.title: AI-Powered Productivity
courses.blurb: Put LLMs to work on your workflow - drafting, triage, and agents that handle real personal-ops tasks.

courses.title: Mind Mapping
courses.blurb: Think on paper - radial maps that untangle a topic, plan a project, or take notes that stick.

courses.title: Data Visualization
courses.blurb: Charts that tell the truth well - encoding, color, and picking the right chart for the question.

courses.title: Sketchnoting
courses.blurb: Visual note-taking - simple icons, layout, and hierarchy to capture ideas as pictures, no art skills needed.

courses.title: Visual Storytelling
courses.blurb: Make ideas land - narrative structure plus visuals, the craft behind your Worth a Thousand Words gallery.

courses.title: AI Illustration
courses.blurb: Generate on-brand, ironic illustrations - style DNA, prompting, and building a repeatable visual voice with AI.

courses.title: Meditation & Breathwork
courses.blurb: The theory of stillness - attention, breath, and nervous-system regulation, with guided practice video.

courses.title: Yoga: Foundations & Flow
courses.blurb: Alignment principles, breath-linked movement, and sequencing theory - form demos stay real, not AI-generated.

courses.title: Yoga Theory
courses.blurb: The why behind the practice - anatomy, the eight limbs, and the philosophy that turns poses into practice.

courses.title: Yoga Flow Design
courses.blurb: Sequence a class that flows - peak-pose planning, counter-poses, and pacing for the room you teach.

courses.title: Yoga Course Design
courses.blurb: Design a full program - a multi-week arc, progressions, and how to take students from beginner to confident.

courses.title: Tai Chi: Principles & Form
courses.blurb: Weight-shift, the five principles, and the philosophy behind the form - the pilot course for the video pipeline.

courses.title: TCM Basics
courses.blurb: Traditional Chinese Medicine concepts - qi, meridians, and the five elements - as a literacy course, not medical advice.

courses.title: K-pop Dance
courses.blurb: Choreography breakdown theory - counts, formations, and drills - paired with a slow-mo, loop-and-mirror practice app.

courses.title: Adult Drum
courses.blurb: Learn drums as an adult - pop and TikTok song charts with practice drills to build memory, timing, and groove.
